title: CodeForge Designation Record
description: One filed object in the CodeForge Classification Registry. Additive metadata keyed to a frozen runtime label; never a rename of it.

designation.description: Unique filing handle: TYPE-DD.NNN (domain code . stable ordinal). See ADR-0008.

domain.description: World domain code (01-10). See ADR-0008 and CLASSIFICATION_SYSTEM.md.

ordinal.description: Stable ordinal within the (type, domain). Minted once, never renumbered.

label.description: The frozen runtime identifier this record files (e.g. a room key, CLI verb, or CARD name). Never renamed.

file.description: Repo-relative path to the source that realizes this object.

docs.description: Repo-relative path to documentation, if any.

tests.description: Repo-relative path to the proving test(s), if any.

reuse.description: What can reuse this object (free text).

superseded_by.description: If superseded, the designation that replaced this one.

aliases.description: Prior designations that still resolve to this record (migration trail).

created.description: ISO date the record was minted.

updated.description: ISO date the record last changed.
